creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes. patch(1) creates new files in your actual directory, so the newly
added pkg-message is in your ~/ports. You need to move it manually to
the libxcb directory.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

If God is perfect, why did He create discontinuous functions?
